summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience across SQL, Python, ETL/data pipelines, data migration, analytics, performance engineering, and production operations. Strong background designing and supporting data solutions across multiple platforms, including AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Oracle, PySpark/Spark, Pandas, and reporting/forecasting datasets. Known for improving automation, operational readiness, runbooks, monitoring, data quality, and scalable platform support in regulated enterprise environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual data preparation processes and improving repeatability for analytics and forecasting.
Designed and maintained Oracle schemas and reporting structures for historical telemetry retention, seasonal analysis, and capacity risk forecasting across enterprise infrastructure.
Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift workloads, and Python automation to support large-scale capacity analytics and data transformation.
Integrated monitoring and operational feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines and executive dashboards.
Improved production support through automation, validation checks, troubleshooting workflows, and operational reporting used for incident prevention and infrastructure planning.
Developed forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to identify capacity bottlenecks months ahead, translating raw operational datasets into actionable planning insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, supporting operational visibility, transaction tracing, and performance analytics.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to surface optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace AppMon from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no regression in production monitoring during cutover.
Integrated load testing and APM visibility through HP Performance Center and Dynatrace, enabling better diagnosis of application bottlenecks.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services environment, supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules used as standards across client monitoring environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, reducing manual weekly exports and improving data availability.
Delivered sizing recommendations, onboarding guidance, documentation, and cross-team technical support for enterprise monitoring and performance engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining transaction performance and data integrity.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing utilities to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation processes during phased migration, reducing risk across platform transition workstreams.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell, C++, C, Java, XML, JSON

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting engine and Streamlit analytics dashboard for enterprise telemetry data, replacing manual forecasting cycles and supporting capacity risk analysis.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark to support scalable ingestion, transformation, and analytics workloads.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based agentic workflow for job intake, semantic duplicate detection, scoring, resume/cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking using structured JSON artifacts.
